safe_scope: Original UI, product-suite planning, web OS shell, device-adaptive digital workspace, and future installable OS roadmap.
do_not_do: Do not overwrite Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, ChromeOS, or any user operating system.
Do not modify bootloaders, partitions, BIOS, UEFI, recovery drives, encryption, or device drivers.
Do not copy Microsoft, Google, Apple, Adobe, Red Hat, Linux distribution, or competitor code/design/assets/trademarks.
Do not claim compatibility, legal compliance, enterprise security, or installability until qualified engineering/legal review is completed.
allowed_now: Create original Brian & Co web OS shell.
Create installable OS roadmap for future engineering.
Promote Brian & Co products in Brian & Co tone.
Use lawful public feature signals only as inspiration, never copying protected material.
